headline: How The ConocoPhillips (COP) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: ConocoPhillips has seen its fair value estimate lifted from US$118.15 to US$128.29, roughly a 9% change that puts a fresh focus on where the stock might sit relative to updated assumptions. This move lines up with a split analyst backdrop, where higher medium term oil price decks support more optimistic targets while others flag valuation risk and softer commodity scenarios. Read on to see how these competing views shape the evolving story around ConocoPhillips and what to watch as the...
